title: Set 2: A Camping Trip ⛺

conversation.speaker: Harry
conversation.text: Are you ready for the camping trip next week, Ben?

conversation.speaker: Harry
conversation.text: Where are we going to put our tents when we arrive?

conversation.speaker: Harry
conversation.text: Will it be very cold at night in the forest?

conversation.speaker: Harry
conversation.text: Who is bringing the torches for us to see in the dark?

conversation.speaker: Harry
conversation.text: I hope we see some interesting wild animals!

conversation.speaker: Harry
conversation.text: Shall we go for a swim in the lake on Tuesday?

options.text: I think William has got two in his rucksack.
So do I, as long as they aren't dangerous!
I went there with my parents last summer.
Yes, I’ve already packed my rucksack!
Only if the water isn't too freezing.
Next to the river, where the ground is flat.
I'll take a map so we don't get lost.
Perhaps, so you should bring a warm blanket.

explanations_vi: Harry hỏi địa điểm dựng lều (Where), Ben đáp là dựng cạnh bờ sông, nơi có đất bằng phẳng (Next to the river).
Harry hỏi trời có lạnh không (Will it be very cold), Ben đáp có lẽ thế (Perhaps) và khuyên nên mang chăn ấm.
Harry hỏi ai sẽ mang đèn pin (Who is bringing the torches), Ben trả lời là William có hai cái trong balo.
Harry hy vọng thấy được động vật hoang dã (I hope...), Ben đồng ý (So do I) miễn là chúng không nguy hiểm.
Harry rủ đi bơi (Shall we go for a swim), Ben đồng ý với điều kiện nước không quá lạnh (Only if the water isn't too freezing).
